arts.ttl: Real Sociedad XI vs Manchester United – Predicted lineup
arts.sum: Real Sociedad make the trip to Manchester United in a huge Europa League tie tonight. Amid disappointing domestic campaigns for both teams, Europe offers an avenue to a successful season. The contest is evenly poised after a 1-1 draw in San Sebastien last week. arts.ttl: Pundit Predictions: Will Ayden Heaven start against Real Sociedad?
arts.sum: With Ugarte having only recently returned to training, Wes thinks Bruno will slot into that deeper midfield role alongside Casemiro, with an exciting attacking trio of first-leg goalscorer Zirkzee, Garnacho and Hojlund. United XI: Onana; Mazraoui, De Ligt, Lindelof; Dalot, Fernandes, Casemiro, Dorgu; Zirkzee, Hojlund, Garnacho.
